# Dromo Pricing - CSV & Excel Importer Plans

## Summary
Official Dromo pricing page for 2026. Dromo is a React/Angular/Vue component for spreadsheet imports that emphasizes client-side processing (Private Mode) and transparent pricing. Professional plan starts at $499/month.

## Key quotations / statistics
- Professional plan: $499/month - includes 250 imports/month, then $2.50 per additional import (up to 100,000 rows)
- Enterprise plan: custom pricing - unlimited imports, headless API/SFTP, on-premise deployments
- Private Mode (client-side only, data never leaves browser): available on ALL plans including Professional
- Headless mode is Enterprise-only add-on

## Annotations for weapon-forge
- The $499/month entry price makes Dromo too expensive for indie/early-stage products - recommend hand-rolled or react-spreadsheet-import for small teams
- Private Mode availability on Professional tier is a key differentiator for compliance-sensitive products
- Headless API requiring Enterprise plan is a limiting factor for products wanting server-side processing
- Compare against Flatfile free tier (50 files/month) and OneSchema (no free tier) when recommending
